Fewer More

All States

    Power Rankings — July 2026
    How to read player information
    1Player Name
    1850±45|68W%|32gp
    Rank · position in the ranking
    Rating · Glicko-2 skill estimate
    ±Deviation · confidence (lower is more certain)
    W% / gp · win rate and games played
    How rankings are determined
    Every set updates both players' ratings with the Glicko-2 system, weighting opponent strength and match outcome. Ratings converge as players compete more, and a player's deviation (uncertainty) rises again the longer they go inactive.
